summary: A short vertical video, posted by a CBP Office of Field Operations account, documenting a port-of-entry drug seizure. Footage shows a CBP officer in dark uniform handling a black Labrador detection dog on a leash beside a dark SUV at an inspection bay, the dog alerting near the vehicle. The clip includes a plain blue and white title card. The audio is a music bed.

script.scene: A CBP officer in dark uniform holds the leash of a black Labrador detection dog beside a dark SUV inside a concrete inspection bay; the dog stands against the vehicle's side.
A plain title card with a blue upper field and white lower field (text not legible in this frame).
